highlights.text: I provided this setup way back on Friday June 20th at 4pm, when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
I expanded on this at the close Monday stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until it ends.
My entry setup is the Failed Breakdown which mirrors institutional accumulation patterns.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the quality Failed Breakdowns we have had over the last week.
5978-82 to 6081= a range (descending triangle) with 6050 a key magnet inside.

post_title: After A Parabolic 9 Green Days, SPX Puts In A Red Day. More Dip Next Week? July 7 Plan
